title: Determining body fat using infrared energy
abstract: A method (200) and a device (100) for detecting body fat using near infra-red energy is disclosed. The method includes transmitting infrared energy (210) at a set of wavelengths to a body and determining a set of values (220) indicative of energy reflectance of the infrared. Further, the method includes determining a set of ratios (230) based on the set of values, wherein the values are based on reflected infrared energy from the body. Subsequently, a fat percentage of the body is determined (240) based on the set of ratios and a statistical model. The statistical model associates a set of reference body fat percentages to the set of ratios. Further, the device (100) may include an energy radiation device (110) to irradiate the body with near infrared energy and an energy receiving device (120) to receive near infrared energy reflected by the body.
